steps.title: Find the shared feeding trait
steps.content: The notes list two food-acquiring methods: snatching prey from the water's surface and taking food from weaker birds. The similarity to emphasize is that neither method requires the frigatebird to dive into the water.

steps.title: Distinguish similarity from listing
steps.content: A covers only snatching prey from the surface. C identifies a difference, since only one method is kleptoparasitism. D lists both methods but does not state what they have in common. The answer is B.
